Frontend: All UI features verified working including Deposit Records dialog, Withdrawal Records with Confirm Receipt, Year Projection dropdown (1-5 years), Large number formatting (Million/Billion/Trillion), Monthly Table accordion (5 years), and Multi-step Reset with password verification.

critical_code_review_comments: All Profit Tracker V2 features implemented correctly
Deposit Records dialog shows Date, Amount, Currency, Notes columns
Withdrawal Records dialog shows all required columns with Confirm Receipt functionality
Year Projection dropdown (1-5 years) updates projections correctly
Large number formatting works: >= 1e12 Trillion, >= 1e9 Billion, >= 1e6 Million
Monthly Table accordion shows 5 years with 12 months each

context_for_next_testing_agent: Profit Tracker V2 features fully tested.
